# Heat Pump Installation Scotland

> Expert heat pump installation, servicing, and repair across Scotland. MCS certified. Subcontractor services available for trade partners.

## About
Heat Pump Installation Scotland provides air source and ground source heat pump installation for homes and businesses across Scotland. We are MCS certified, Gas Safe registered, RECC members, and SNIPEF approved. We also act as a trusted subcontractor for heating companies, builders, and property developers.

## Services
- Air Source Heat Pump Installation
- Ground Source Heat Pump Installation
- Heat Pump Servicing and Repair
- Grant and Funding Support (Home Energy Scotland, Boiler Upgrade Scheme, ECO)
- Subcontractor Services for trade partners

## Service Area
We serve all of Scotland including Edinburgh, Glasgow, Aberdeen, Dundee, Inverness, the Highlands, Borders, and Dumfries.

## Contact
- Email: scott@conlinconstruction.co.uk
- Phone: 01234 567890
- Website: https://clconlin.github.io/HeatPumpScotland/
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/scotlandnationalteam/

## Key Facts
- MCS Certified (Microgeneration Certification Scheme)
- Gas Safe Registered
- RECC Member (Renewable Energy Consumer Code)
- SNIPEF Approved (Scottish and Northern Ireland Plumbing Employers' Federation)
- Free site surveys and quotes
- Grant application support included
